section_path_text: CLARKSON PLATOU HELLAS S&P WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
In tankers, STX Jinhae have announced a plethora of deals this week. The yard has signed six firm 50k dwt MR's with an unknown owner
Source: Clarkson PLC
